team_name: InferX — AI-Powered Tender Evaluation with Explainability & Human-in-the-Loop Validation
summary: Design an AI-powered technical platform for automating tender evaluation, ensuring transparency, auditability, and human control. The system should process multi-format documents, perform intelligent extraction of tender criteria, evidence extraction from bidder documents, deterministic rule-based evaluation, explainable results with source references, and human-in-the-loop validation for ambiguous cases.
key_steps: Intelligent extraction of tender criteria using LLMs
optimization_claims: Introduces transparency into government procurement systems
constraints_addressed: Manual, complex, and error-prone process involving the verification of multiple bidder documents
